meta.description: Clustering gold set: labeled article-story and story-story pairs for evaluating clustering attach decisions and (later) the Clustering Judge agent. Built from PROD clustering logs (near-miss/override diagnostics) + hand-verified seeds from docs/features/clustering-quality/plan.md Part 1.
meta.labeling_principle: same_event = the two items report/analyze the SAME discrete real-world occurrence (announcement, ruling, speech, election night, disclosure release), including same-cycle reactions, commentary, and circumstances of that occurrence (July 4th precedent: storm evacuation + speech = one occasion). different_event = separate developments even within one saga: filing vs ruling days apart, resignation vs replacement, order vs later court block, rumor vs act, two strikes in a series, recurring formats (Live Results templates, weekly punditry), and coverage separated by months (thread material, not one event).
meta.provenance: Similarities are decision-time values from PROD run logs (embed_best) or one-time build-time centroid computation (story_story pairs). Story/article features fetched via read-only anon PostgREST at build time (2026-07-05) - current-state snapshot, may differ slightly from decision-time state. NEVER refetch embeddings at eval time (egress rule #11).
meta.labeled_by: Claude (Fable) first pass; Josh spot-check completed 2026-07-05 (all 48 disagreement pairs + calibration reviewed): 2 flips (gs-168, gs-189 - chain-of-events rule), 2 removals (gs-111, gs-113 - content out of tracker scope), borderlines annotated (gs-099, gs-002, gs-063, gs-102)
meta.schema_note: pair_type=story_story entries (July 4th cluster) have BOTH sides story-shaped: a.headline/a.top_entities/a.article_titles (no a.title), and replay carries centroid_sim_raw/centroid_sim_normalized instead of embed_sim. The deterministic replay skips them; they exist for Clustering Judge (ADO-533) dry-run validation.
meta.raw_extracts: scripts/evals/clustering-log-extracts-2026-07-05.txt.gz - the PROD log extract file this set was built from (gunzip, then build-clustering-gold-set.js --extracts=... regenerates the unlabeled draft). Labels themselves are hand-applied and live only here.
meta.verification_status: VERIFIED 2026-07-05 (Josh spot-check). Removed ids gs-111/gs-113 are intentionally sparse - never renumber. Key ruling for the Judge prompt (ADO-533): chain-of-events beats (indictment->halt, action->follow-up comment) are SEPARATE stories even within the same 24h; same-cycle reactions/commentary on one occurrence are the SAME story.
